title: Prompt Security, Untrusted Context, Privacy, and Authorization · Evaluation Brief: Least Context
summary: Harden a tool-using prompt that processes untrusted documents and external results. Planned artifact: Add and verify the prompt least context increment in a prompt threat model and red-team suite. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Exclude secrets and irrelevant proprietary context and minimize tool privileges.
Recognize direct and indirect prompt injection and prevent authority escalation.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Predict Least Context
steps.instruction:
Use a changed theory case derived from this module: prompt security injection. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.
